title: Day 6 Lesson 3 ( Video )How do you come to school
html:
Day 6 - Lesson 3

つうがく　しゅだんを　きく  (tsuugaku shudan o kiku) = How do you come to school?

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ  (kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): たかはしさん、やまださん りゅうがくせい　ふたり  (Takahashi-san, Yamada-san ryuugaksee hutari) = Takahashi san, Yamada san two study abroad students

For the new words, please refer to the vocabulary section and the subtitles.
